community_note.title: Readers added context they thought people might want to know
community_note.summary:
The "NO TAX ON SOCIAL SECURITY" is a temporary $6,000 tax deduction for seniors 65+, making benefits tax-free for ~51 million recipients (88%). Benefits remain taxable under federal law, so higher-income seniors may still pay taxes. Expires after 2028.

taxfoundation.org/blog/no-tax-on…
taxpolicycenter.org/taxvox/correct…
waysandmeans.house.gov/2025/08/18/no-…
